tribe_description: This micro-cluster consists of highly technical, detail-oriented hobbyists—primarily gamers and peripheral tinkerers—who rigorously test products and write structured, comparison-rich reviews. Their writing style mirrors their characteristics: they list measurable pros/cons, reference previous benchmarks, and call out even minor engineering oversights to help fellow power users and keep manufacturers accountable.
tribe_definition: A tribe of technical performance enthusiasts who get genuinely excited about products that fit their interests. They generally prioritize technical performance, real-world performance.
population_definition: Gamers who evaluate video games, consoles, accessories, and entertainment products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Hands-on testers who verify specs through use
Value-conscious but willing to pay for quality
Consumer advocates pushing for better engineering
Comparative thinkers referencing prior gear as benchmarks

main.text: Gaining granular control and customization options
Ensuring ergonomic comfort during prolonged use
Sharing technical knowledge with the community

validation_triggers: Accurate, responsive performance (e.g., sensors, audio drivers)
Comprehensive, easy-to-use customization software or hardware adapters
Good value bundles that combine multiple useful features
friction_points: Inconsistent or buggy software/firmware that resets settings
Poor build tolerances causing premature failures or loose parts
Uncomfortable fit or sub-optimal key/button placement
Limited compatibility or restrictive design choices (e.g., lack of disc drive)
Overhyped features that don’t match real-world performance

implicit_goals.text: Assemble a reliable, high-performance setup that lasts
Guide like-minded consumers toward the best technical choices
Influence manufacturers to improve product quality and software stability

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is technically minded and motivated by measurable performance and reliability, especially in gaming hardware. They validate products with empirical data and candidly share detailed observations to confirm or debunk marketing claims. Their reviews are analytical and precision-oriented, aiming to guide fellow consumers toward dependable, high-performing purchases while steering them away from inferior knock-offs.

This user is a hands-on gaming and tech hobbyist who values functional performance and precise fit, especially for family arcade or VR setups. Their reviews are usually concise endorsements when products meet expectations, but they become thorough and critical when design or sizing flaws interfere with practical use, signaling a motivation to steer fellow enthusiasts toward dependable, well-made gear.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a practical, hands-on gaming hobbyist focused on building custom setups and ensuring equipment functions flawlessly for family entertainment. Their brief, enthusiastic reviews center on reliability, build quality, and ease of integration, serving as quick affirmations for fellow hobbyists that a product 'just works.' The primary motivation appears to be sharing positive reassurance and validating purchase choices rather than providing in-depth technical analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is highly fit-focused and detail-oriented, scrutinizing garment proportions (arm length, torso length, hood size) relative to their body and reporting precise observations. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to warn others about sizing inconsistencies and highlight functional shortcomings that outweigh aesthetic appeal. They provide specific measurements and even attach photos, suggesting a conscientious intent to supply actionable information for shoppers seeking reliable fit guidance.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a tech-savvy gaming and simulation enthusiast who prioritizes build quality, realism, and functional convenience in hardware. They write experiential, detail-oriented reviews after extended use to verify durability, highlighting specific technical features and offering practical improvement tips so fellow hobbyists can make well-informed purchase decisions.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a tech-savvy hobbyist, likely a simulation and VR enthusiast, who is motivated by build quality, functional integration, and user-experience enhancements. Their reviews are detail-oriented, describing real-world usage, durability tests, and customization options to guide fellow enthusiasts toward reliable, feature-rich gear, while also suggesting improvements for future iterations.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is durability-focused and deliberately withholds judgment until the product has been tested over time, signaling a careful, quality-validation approach. Their motivation centers on ensuring long-term reliability and the enjoyment of loved ones (e.g., a grandchild), leading them to highlight construction materials, wear-and-tear performance, and overall sturdiness. They write reviews to reassure other caregivers and practical buyers that the item will hold up under heavy, real-world use.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user’s reviews are driven by how well a fashion item fits and visually flatters their loved one, signaling a motivation rooted in aesthetic appeal and personal relationship satisfaction. They offer brief, affirmative endorsements rather than detailed critiques, suggesting a straightforward, experience-based approach aimed at sharing a quick positive impression.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a performance-oriented, detail-focused gamer who scrutinizes build quality, comfort during extended use, and audio accuracy, often comparing multiple products to establish benchmarks. They are motivated by securing strong value without sacrificing durability or premium materials, and their analytical, experience-based reviews aim to guide fellow gamers and quality-conscious shoppers toward the best long-term choices.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is an analytical, performance-focused gamer whose reviews center on technical quality (sound accuracy, mic clarity), long-term comfort, and build durability tested through extended play sessions. They are highly value-conscious, consistently benchmarking price against competing models and judging whether a product’s features justify its cost. Their purpose is to give fellow gamers thorough, experience-based guidance that highlights practical strengths and weaknesses so others can make informed purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a practical, performance-oriented gaming enthusiast who rigorously tests products hands-on and compares them against alternatives to assess build quality, comfort, audio fidelity, and mic clarity. They balance technical detail with price awareness, writing thorough, experience-based analyses aimed at helping fellow PlayStation users choose gear that offers the best blend of durability and value.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is a quality-conscious, detail-oriented shopper who values craftsmanship, material provenance, and sensory cues like scent to assess product excellence. They write thorough, enthusiastic reviews to validate smart purchases and highlight high value from lesser-known brands, aiming to guide others toward well-made items that protect and enhance their fashion investments.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a technically savvy, detail-oriented hobbyist—especially around retro gaming hardware—who writes reviews to document rigorous, hands-on testing and objective performance metrics (signal quality, latency, build, fit). Their primary motivation is to help similarly discerning consumers avoid hidden flaws and find the most functionally sound, high-value products, so their reviews are analytical, comparison-rich, and openly critical when expectations aren’t met.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is a technically proficient retro-gaming enthusiast who scrutinizes appliances through a lens of signal integrity, latency, build quality, and cross-system compatibility. Their reviews are methodical, data-driven, and explanatory, aiming to guide fellow hobbyists by documenting nuanced performance findings and practical caveats discovered through hands-on testing. They are motivated by a desire for pixel-perfect authenticity and by a communal impulse to share well-researched insights that help others purchase with confidence.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a technically minded hobbyist who methodically tests gaming accessories across multiple platforms, emphasizing functional reliability, build quality, and precise performance. Their reviews are detailed and diagnostic, calling out both strengths and hidden flaws to offer evidence-based guidance and troubleshoot issues for fellow gamers. They are motivated by helping others avoid compatibility or quality pitfalls and value dependable gear over superficial appeal.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is motivated by accurate product representation and tangible quality indicators; they scrutinize construction details, durability after use, and how the garment’s silhouette aligns with marketing images. Their writing is balanced and analytical, highlighting both strengths and discrepancies so that future buyers know exactly what to expect. Overall, they appear driven by a desire to protect consumers from misleading advertising while rewarding reliable craftsmanship.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a meticulous, tech-savvy audiovisual enthusiast who evaluates products through hands-on testing, focusing on visual fidelity, feature completeness, and future-proof capabilities. They write detailed, step-by-step reviews to document troubleshooting findings and customization tips, aiming to help similarly technical users and push manufacturers toward better usability. Their motivation is driven by problem-solving satisfaction, community knowledge-sharing, and a perfectionist desire for optimal performance.

category_characteristics.Software: This reviewer is a tech-savvy, detail-oriented user who focuses on feature depth, performance quality, and future-proof capabilities (4K, HDR, 8K, casting, customization). Their motivation is to evaluate how well software meets practical, technical expectations and to flag specific usability quirks, aiming both to guide other informed users and to prompt developers to refine shortcomings. They value clarity and seamless user experience, leading them to write balanced, feature-by-feature critiques rather than broad impressions.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a technically inclined retro-gaming enthusiast whose reviews are driven by problem-solving and community assistance. They provide meticulous, step-by-step accounts of troubleshooting processes, valuing technical accuracy and practical guidance to help fellow tinkerers resolve specific hardware or firmware issues.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, detail-oriented shopper—especially for gaming gear—who constantly weighs cost against performance and durability. Their reviews aim to equip fellow buyers with practical insights by dissecting fit, compatibility, and build quality while transparently comparing items to brand-name or prior versions. Driven by value-for-money and a desire to spare others from hidden drawbacks, they deliver balanced, experience-based assessments that spotlight both strengths and shortcomings.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a pragmatic, detail-oriented gamer who carefully weighs price against build quality and performance. They systematically test features, compatibility, and durability, then share nuanced observations and cautionary tips so others can make informed, cost-effective purchases. Their reviews are motivated by maximizing value without sacrificing reliability, reflecting a technically knowledgeable consumer who sees the write-up as a helpful guide for peers.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is motivated by practical performance and value-for-money, carefully weighing product specifications against advertised claims and price. Their reviews are methodical and balanced, highlighting both usability details (fit, comfort, connectors) and potential pitfalls (sound quality, model compatibility) to set realistic expectations for other shoppers. They appear driven by a desire to help readers make informed, risk-aware purchasing decisions rather than simply sharing personal opinions.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is pragmatic and detail-oriented, motivated by ensuring accurate fit, fabric quality, and practical design functionality for everyday wear. They share precise body measurements, garment performance (opacity, length, laundering), and styling observations to help shoppers with similar needs and to hold brands accountable for clear product representation. Their writing is purposeful and instructional, reflecting a desire to provide utilitarian, experience-based guidance rather than emotional praise.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is motivated by practical performance and successful technical compatibility, writing reviews primarily to confirm that a product works well with their gaming setup. They value functionality and enjoyment over detailed analysis, leading to brief, highly enthusiastic endorsements that emphasize positive outcomes rather than nuanced evaluation.

category_characteristics.Software: This user provides extremely concise, positive reviews that signal a straightforward sense of satisfaction rather than detailed analysis. They appear motivated by efficiency and minimalism, offering quick endorsements to communicate approval and guide others without investing time in extensive explanations.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is motivated by confirming practical functionality and compatibility between gaming hardware, and writes reviews mainly to reassure others that specific device configurations work. Their style is highly succinct and enthusiastic, relying on repeated positive exclamations rather than technical depth, indicating a priority on sharing quick, confidence-boosting endorsements rather than detailed analysis.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a technically knowledgeable gamer and remote worker who puts products through heavy, real-world use, making them highly attuned to build quality, longevity and performance. They write balanced, detail-rich reviews that compare alternatives, note personal usage context, and weigh pros and cons so that fellow enthusiasts can avoid poor-quality items and invest in gear that will hold up under intensive use.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is quality-conscious and performance-oriented, testing hardware and games thoroughly and quickly rejecting anything that wastes time or fails to work reliably. They write balanced, descriptive reviews that mix technical observations with experiential impressions, aiming to save fellow gamers money and frustration while steering them toward immersive, high-quality titles. Their motivation is a mix of consumer advocacy and genuine enthusiasm for engaging gameplay that delights both themselves and their kids.
category_characteristics.Software: This user is a demanding power-user who values durability, build quality, and real-world performance under heavy, everyday use. They craft detailed, balanced reviews that openly weigh pros and cons, reference comparative experience, and clarify how their own intensive usage might influence wear, all to give other consumers a fair, practical picture. Their motivation is to help fellow gamers and professionals make informed value-for-money decisions while warning about quality or longevity issues.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented, technically minded gamer who values mechanical depth, functionality, and aesthetic presentation, leading them to write long, systematic breakdowns of pros, cons, and work-around tips. Their reviews aim to inform and guide fellow players by exposing glitches, assessing challenge and realism, and weighing overall fun against design flaws and value for money. The motivation is equal parts consumer advocacy and sharing expertise, driven by a desire for optimized, immersive play experiences.

This user is quality-centric and technically knowledgeable, especially about gaming peripherals, and is driven by a strong expectation of durability, reliability, and fair pricing. They test products extensively, scrutinize build materials and customer-service policies, and write candid, often critical reviews to warn others when brands fall short and to praise old-school craftsmanship when it meets their high standards. Their primary motivation is to protect fellow buyers from wasted money and to highlight products that truly deliver long-term value.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is strongly motivated by long-term reliability, solid build quality, and fair pricing, often benchmarking new purchases against trusted older models. They write candid, detail-rich critiques when products or customer support fall below their durability and value expectations, aiming to warn others and pressure brands to uphold higher standards.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is primarily authenticity-oriented, motivated to confirm that a product is genuine and functions properly. They communicate in very brief, matter-of-fact statements that serve to reassure other buyers about legitimacy and basic performance rather than offering detailed analysis or emotional commentary.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is motivated by safeguarding others from ineffective or misleading products, spending considerable time troubleshooting before forming an opinion. They place strong emphasis on functional reliability and equitable return policies, writing frank, cautionary reviews to prevent fellow shoppers from wasting money.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is driven by an appreciation for traditional craftsmanship and tangible quality, praising items that feel durable and evoke an 'old-school' aesthetic. Their reviews are concise yet highly enthusiastic, using emphatic language and exclamation to celebrate superior build and materials. They write primarily to endorse well-made, long-lasting products and share their excitement with like-minded shoppers seeking premium, nostalgic pieces.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, performance-oriented consumer whose reviews center on how well products function, last, and match advertised specs—especially in gaming and fitness contexts. They focus on technical details, comfort, and build quality, offering concise, issue-oriented feedback to help peers avoid defects and find gear that truly works.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a pragmatic gamer who concentrates on the day-to-day functionality, durability, and reliability of gaming hardware and services. They provide balanced, experience-based feedback—calling out build-quality flaws and praising practical conveniences—to help fellow gamers avoid frustration and choose gear that works consistently. Their motivation centers on safeguarding usability and value rather than brand loyalty, resulting in concise yet detailed evaluations.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by practical accuracy and everyday functionality: they expect products to match stated specifications and to perform well during real-life activities like yoga. Their candid, succinct reviews either warn others when they feel cheated or commend items that deliver comfort and solve specific problems such as sweat management. Ultimately, they write to protect fellow shoppers from mismatched purchases and highlight gear that reliably enhances daily use.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a detail-oriented, usability-focused hobbyist—especially in gaming—who combines nostalgic enthusiasm with rigorous, hands-on testing. Their reviews dissect ergonomics, interface design, durability, and aesthetics, offering balanced pros and cons plus practical tips so others can avoid frustration and optimize their experience. They are motivated by a desire to help fellow consumers make informed, functionality-driven choices rather than by price alone.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This reviewer is motivated by practical functionality and real-world usability, focusing on how well a product accommodates their gear while remaining compact and inconspicuous for security. They write concise, experience-based reviews to reassure others about capacity, portability, and discreet design, aiming to help shoppers choose items that seamlessly fit everyday mobile lifestyles.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a technically savvy, detail-oriented gamer who evaluates products through the dual lenses of practical usability and emotional appeal (especially nostalgia and aesthetics). Their reviews dissect control schemes, interface design, and technical performance, separating subjective enjoyment from objective quality to give balanced, constructive feedback. They write with the purpose of setting realistic expectations and helping fellow consumers make informed decisions while implicitly advocating for better user-experience standards.
category_characteristics.null: This user is a passionate gamer-collector who evaluates items through a dual lens of aesthetic appeal and in-game utility. They write balanced, detail-oriented reviews that share practical tips, point out design shortcomings, and convey personal enthusiasm, aiming to help fellow players make informed choices. Their motivation lies in enhancing the gaming experience for others while celebrating the characters and features they find most enjoyable.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is detail-oriented and practicality-driven, focusing on how fashion items perform in real-world use—comfort, fit adjustments, maintenance, and long-term durability. They balance functional critiques with aesthetic observations, offering step-by-step tips so others can replicate or avoid their experiences. Their primary motivation is to equip fellow shoppers with nuanced, experience-based guidance rather than simple endorsements.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is technically savvy and values functional reliability, user control, and thoughtful engineering. They write detailed, diagnostic reviews that highlight specific hardware-software interactions, support experiences, and design nuances, aiming to warn others about potential flaws and steer them toward well-engineered solutions. Their motivation is rooted in holding manufacturers accountable and helping fellow users avoid technical frustrations while maximizing practical value.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is a technically proficient, detail-oriented reviewer who values control, customization, and reliability in software. Their reviews are analytical and comparative, highlighting practical functionality, documenting flaws or bugs, and aiming to help others optimize productivity and avoid technical pitfalls.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is technically savvy and function-focused, scrutinizing products for practical functionality, firmware/hardware design, and real-world usability. Their reviews are detailed and critical, aiming to warn prospective buyers about overlooked flaws and ineffective customer support while highlighting cost-benefit considerations. Overall, they write to advocate for reliable engineering and good value, using analytical commentary to guide others toward informed purchasing decisions.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is practical and experience-driven, emphasizing ease of installation, functional performance, and long-term durability when evaluating products. Drawing on prior frustrations, they provide descriptive, hands-on feedback to help others avoid common pitfalls and quickly find reliable, hassle-free solutions.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic gamer who values reliable performance and core functionality in their equipment, quickly criticizing products that fail essential tasks like charging or trigger responsiveness. Their reviews are motivated by a desire to warn fellow gamers about quality shortcomings while still acknowledging secondary positives (comfort, aesthetics), showing a balanced yet performance-driven perspective.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is a practical gamer who prioritizes reliability and core functionality in hardware; when critical features fail, their primary reaction is frustration. category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is practicality-focused and writes succinct, candid reviews aimed at flagging functional failures while acknowledging any redeeming comfort or design aspects. member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a technically knowledgeable gamer who prioritizes functional freedom, backward compatibility, and reliability over surface-level improvements. They write thorough, critical reviews to warn fellow consumers about hidden costs and restrictive design choices, advocating for user control and fair value retention. Their motivation stems from protecting consumer investment and pushing companies toward more thoughtful, customizable products.

AHC5A4JLUD3WHR64VFBGUR4AK3GQ.product_description: G-STORY Cooling Fan for Xbox Series X with Automatic Fan Speed Adjustable by Temperature, LED Display, High Performance Cooling, Low Noise, 3 Speed 1500/1750/2000RPM (140MM) with RGB LED
AHC5A4JLUD3WHR64VFBGUR4AK3GQ.review_text: For once, a cooler that actually works. I was a bit skeptical buying this with all the past knock-offs for other consoles on the market, but this cooler actually keeps my Series X cool. Without the cooler, the console can push 120°F, but with the cooler, it has a convenient temp probe built in and it adjusts as needed. My Xbox stays a cool 98-100° now with most games. When it cools below 95, it turns off to save power. Great product!
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH3GHB6S6HAEQEWEG7PSU5RSSI3Q.product_description: The Thrustmaster T3PA-PRO 3-Pedal Add-On Pedal Set is a realistic, high-end pedal set that will take your driving experience to a whole new level! It offers 2 different positions (floor-mounted or suspended), 100% metal construction, 100% adjustability, and includes 2 different removable BRAKE MODS. Its unique design allows for 2 different user positions - Floor-mounted (F1-style) and Suspended (GT-style). It features 3 metal pedals, a large metal footrest with non-slip grating, internal and external metal structure, and weighs more than 15 pounds. There is adjustable spacing for each of the 3 pedals (3 possible positions per pedal); adjustable inclination for each of the 3 pedals (2 possible positions per pedal); and adjustable height for each of the 3 pedals (4 possible positions for the gas pedal / 3 positions for the brake and clutch pedals). The T3PA-PRO includes 2 different removable BRAKE MODS that are installed directly underneath the brake pedal - The mods' position can be adjusted, thereby altering the pressure force. The SPRING BRAKE MOD is composed of an additional compression spring while the CONICAL RUBBER BRAKE MOD is composed of a conical stop made from industrial-grade high-density rubber, for an authentic feel and ultra-progressive resistance at the end of the pedal's range of travel. The brake pedal pressure force can be adjusted between 15 lbs. and 22 lbs., according to your preferences (with no BRAKE MOD installed). Using the SPRING BRAKE MOD, the pressure force can be adjusted between 31 lbs. and 35 lbs. With the CONICAL RUBBER BRAKE MOD installed, pressure force can be adjusted between 44 lbs. and 66 lbs. The range of travel can also be adjusted (in all instances with or without a BRAKE MOD installed). The T3PA-PRO is compatible with all Thrustmaster T-Series Racing Wheels including the T300 RS / T300 Ferrari GTE, T500 RS / Ferrari F1 Wheel Integral T500, and TX Racing Wheel Ferrari 458 Italia Edition / Ferrari 458 Spider Racing Wheel. Compatible and customizable with most pedal kits sold in motorsport accessories shops.
AH3GHB6S6HAEQEWEG7PSU5RSSI3Q.review_text: I liked the all metal construction. The pedals are realistic and I enjoy ats so much more.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH3GHB6S6HAEQEWEG7PSU5RSSI3Q.product_description: Product Description Amazon Basics Xbox One Wired Controller - 9.8 Foot USB Cable, Black, Version 2 From the Manufacturer Amazon Basics
AH3GHB6S6HAEQEWEG7PSU5RSSI3Q.review_text: This was purchased for my grandson and he really likes it for his computer gaming. It holds up well and I have delayed the review just to see if it was a good quality.  It is and my grandson puts a lot of wear and tear on it and it still functions just fine.  Great quality and durability in this product.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AG565VX3WUFVUGNZTQOZEESMR7LA.product_description: Use the Victrix Gambit Wireless Gaming Headset for home and tournament play. Operate wirelessly with a 40-foot connection, or plug in the included 3.5mm cable, with in-line controls, to power your headset and make it competition legal. Hear your enemy before you see them with built-in Dolby Atmos surround sound capabilities and a lifetime subscription. Experience our Spectral Hearing through 50mm HD speaker drivers that deliver a superior dynamic range. Get all-day comfort and a near-weightless experience with the ultra-lightweight design. Be heard, loud and clear through the bi-directional, noise-canceling mic originally created for the Cobra attack helicopter. As an officially licensed product, you'll get the quality you rely on to make your game-winning moves.
AG565VX3WUFVUGNZTQOZEESMR7LA.review_text:
Let me start by saying that I ended up returning a HyperX Cloud Stinger Core for these because I was so impressed with these! The HyperX felt like it was too plasticky for me and the hinges didn't feel like they'd last but I don't have that issue with the Victrix Gambit. I have not heard sounds clearer than I have with these as the 3D Audio from the Playstation 5 works flawlessly with the Gambit.

The earcups are wrapped with a nice feeling vegan leather that seems to clean pretty easily. Headset feels nice when it's on, even after using it over several hours of gaming. The mic comes in crystal clear to other parties when using it for game chat. The only issue I could find is that the noise gate for the noise canceling is sensitive when it came to recording. I tested these to record some content and found that some of the things I said had cut out because I didn't say it loud enough. No big deal for me, just meant I had to speak more clear (which I should be anyways while recording!).

It'd be well worth the price to me ($103.88 as of this review time) to purchase these for a Playstation 5 user! While comfortable, the Sony Playstation Pulse 3D Headset (which goes for $99 and is Sony's official headset for the PS5) had a mic that sounds muffled when in recording. Sound also seems to come in better on the Gambit for me!
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH5Q2SMGHRPRCCUXOQUOBMJBA4FQ.product_description: SIKROFEGEN Carrying Case Compatible with Steam Deck, Protective Hard Shell Carry Case Built-in AC Adapter Charger Storage, Portable Travel Carrying Case Pouch for Steam Deck Console & Accessories
AH5Q2SMGHRPRCCUXOQUOBMJBA4FQ.review_text:
This case works really well and the outer case feels solid. The steamdeck fits snugly with a good amount of storage underneath. There's enough room for cards, chargers, and a full mouse.

The zipper is a little cheap and I've had teeth skip or snag a little but nothing severe.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AH5Q2SMGHRPRCCUXOQUOBMJBA4FQ.product_description: DOYO Xbox 360 Game Racing Wheels,PC Steering Wheel Plug and Play Gaming Driving Volante 180° USB with Pedals Shifter Bundle for XBOX 360 / Windows PC / PS3 /Nintendo switch/Android
AH5Q2SMGHRPRCCUXOQUOBMJBA4FQ.review_text:
This is really disappointing, as it promises a lot of compatibility in a simple low-cost package. The build quality feels decent and it has access to all the major face buttons. As well as this, every system I tried recognized it quickly. All of these are good points, but it simply wasn't usable.

I've attempted to use this wheel on Switch, PC, and PS3. On all devices the wheel was stuck reading straight up and slightly to the right. Essentially the systems read it as an analog stick stuck at around the 1-o-clock position, with a slight range of right and left tilt by turning. I wasn't able to correct this with any console calibration settings and there were no troubleshooting tips in the manual.

It's impossible to navigate any menus with it constantly pointing up, and it cannot point fully right or left due to this reading. I have to stress that there's no physical problem with the wheel itself: it PHYSICALLY centers normally and feels solid. But, at center, it outputs a 1-o-clock on the analog stick and can only move slightly right or left of that position.

Other reviewers don't seem to have this issue, so I am unsure what's wrong with mine.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AEE7MG6U3CF55YKDFHQFRUVYLUPA.product_description: Marseille's mClassic upscaler is the world’s first plug-and-play graphics card that boosts gaming console’s graphics in real-time to produce clean, sharp images. This video game enhancer finely redraws each pixel, making them look vivid again, with virtually zero lag!
AEE7MG6U3CF55YKDFHQFRUVYLUPA.review_text: So when I first got it (my mom ordered it on her Amazon account for my birthday that was January 11th). I had trouble getting any picture out. I just got black screen when trying to get the green light option on. Only super Mario sunshine worked. So messing around in swiss had no fix. I didn't have any black screen flickering like others said. So it got me thinking maybe the gcvideo firmware has a setting to fix this. I have pluto hdmi II modded into my GameCube. I ended up finding the setting that did indeed make it work. If you go under advance in the gcvideo settings (hold L + R + y + x at the same time till it pops up). You will see the screen shown in my picture I included.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.product_description: Powerextra PS-3 Wireless Controller for PS-3, 2 Pack High Performance Gaming Controller with Upgraded Joystick Double Shock for Play-Station 3 (Black and Blue)
AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.review_text:
I acquired this set simply because I wanted a spare set for my old PS3. Usually just getting the controllers are almost as expensive as buying an entire PS3 console these days so at this print point I jumped at the chance.

The controllers work consistently, just like my original Sony controllers. However, they are a little clacky and the joysticks are stiff. I've had much the same experience with other second-market controllers for my other Playstation systems.

As a result, when I invite my friends over, I continue to use my Sony controllers while offering these controllers to them.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.product_description: Tacky design sakura skin Compatible with Nintendo Switch Skins Decal, Nintendo Switch Stickers Vinyl 3m Flowres Switch, Blossom switch Full wrap cover
AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.review_text: It's truly amazing how perfectly this skin fits my device. They aren't kidding when they say "precision cut". I will admit that it was a bit of a project to get all the sections put into place but I was careful and didn't experience any problems with wrinkles or having to unstick and re-stick into place. The skin works well to protect itself from abuse too. The material is more than just scratch resistant but feels strong and will no doubt protect the device itself as well.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.product_description: COWBOX Elite Switch Controller, Wireless Pro Controller for Android/ iOS13~16/PC/Switch with Phone Holder Bracket, 30s' Operations Customizable Back-Buttons,Bluetooth Mobile Gamepad for MFi Games
AG6VOWUSOBTM7LRL2BCG43ETSWSA.review_text:
This is a very nice controller. I bought it mainly for my Switch but it is compatible with so many things including iPhones, iPads, Android phones, PCs, MACs, APPLE TV and of course Switch. If you’re buying it for a specific game, then check compatibility before you buy as not all software works with it. Also, some games just aren’t designed to be played with this kind of controller, especially those that use a lot of scrolling.

Cool features include two back buttons which can be programmed, an adjustable turbo function, and nice tactile feedback when pressing buttons. It can take a few hours (7-8 hours) to charge but, happily, you can play even while it’s charging. If using this with a Switch, then it is very easy to pair. During TV mode, just press the home button to wake up the Switch and it will connect automatically.

The whole unit seems solid and is just feels like a quality product. Recommended, especially at this price.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AGBVDMH3GYVFLNM5NZYB7BBOB5RA.product_description: Brook Super Converter series makes old controllers compatible with newconsoles. This particular model, the Xbox 360 to Xbox One Controller Adapter, lets you use Xbox 360 controllers such as gamepads, dance mats, joysticks and racing wheels with Xbox One game consoles and Xbox One on PC. This not only saves you money but also means that you can use the controllers you have grown accustomed to. Installation and use of the Xbox 360 to Xbox One Controller Adapter is effortless. PS: This product can also be used as an “Xbox One to Xbox One” Controller Adapter in that it lets you assign a Turbo function button and customize the button layout of Xbox One controllers. Features Compatible with gamepads, racing wheels and dance mats Compatible with gamepads, racing wheels and dance mats Works with Xbox One and PC Works with Xbox One and PC Hot Swapping Hot Swapping Full compliance with environmental standards Full compliance with environmental standards Auto register controllers Auto register controllers USB Interface USB Interface Optimal button mapping Optimal button mapping Remembers up to 4 controllers Remembers up to 4 controllers Vibration support Vibration support No original controller verification No original controller verification Lightweight and USB sized Lightweight and USB sized NOTE: Each Brook Controller Adapter can handle only one Xbox 360 or Xbox One game controller at a time. For use with a PC running on Windows 7 please install the original Xbox One driver from Microsoft. Older operating systems are not supported.It does not support headset or headphone IMPORTANT : please update to the latest firmware before use. Package Includes 1 x Controller Adapter1 x ManualPlease check the compatibility of your controller at the official brook website before you placing the order, NOT all brands or models of controllers / wheels / Joystick are compatible with the brook adapter. Not Compatible: PDP：Mortal Kombat X Fight Pad for Xbox One and Xbox 360 PDP：Mortal Kombat X Fight Pad for Xbox One and Xbox 360 PDP：Legendary Collecti PDP：Legendary Collecti
AGBVDMH3GYVFLNM5NZYB7BBOB5RA.review_text: I have used this one on a Xbox one x in order to connect  a Xbox 360 control wheel and it is working  very well.

AHSMPF3M33JV7MV4QLZOU72ZSATA.product_description: Gamerz Tek 8-Bit Entertainment System, NES clone console, relive those childhood memories and play all you favorite Nintendo games again. Comes with two controllers, audio video cable & ac adapter.
AHSMPF3M33JV7MV4QLZOU72ZSATA.review_text: The audio came through okay but the video was just running in diagonal lines across the screen.  I thought maybe it could be the game. So I tried ever game I had. It still did not work. So I ended up buying a different brand, a retron console, and every game worked perfectly without issue.  Maybe this could have been one bad unit, but it was not worth my time to constantly try new ones. I just spent the extra money on a better quality clone.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity

AHSMPF3M33JV7MV4QLZOU72ZSATA.product_description: Marvel’s Spider Man features your favorite web slinger in a story unlike any before it. Now a seasoned Super Hero, Peter Parker has been busy keeping crime off the streets as Spider Man. Just as he’s ready to focus on life as Peter, a new villain threatens New York City. Faced with overwhelming odds and higher stakes, Spider Man must rise up and be greater.   Sony Interactive Entertainment, Marvel and Insomniac Games present Marvel’s Spider Man exclusively for PlayStation 4. Be Spider Man After eight years behind the mask, Peter Parker is a crime fighting master. Feel the full power of a more experienced Spider Man with improvisational combat, dynamic acrobatics, fluid urban traversal, and environmental interactions. A rookie no longer, this is the most masterful Spider Man you’ve ever played. Worlds Collide The worlds of Peter Parker and Spider Man collide in an original action packed story. In this new Spider Man universe, iconic characters from Peter and Spider Man’s lives have been reimagined, placing familiar characters in unique roles. Marvel’s New York is Your Playground The Big Apple comes to life as Insomniac’s most expansive and interactive world yet. Swing through vibrant neighborhoods and catch breathtaking views of iconic Marvel and Manhattan landmarks. Use the environment to defeat villains with epic takedowns in true blockbuster action.
AHSMPF3M33JV7MV4QLZOU72ZSATA.review_text:
The kids have played this over and over again since I bought it.
It is amazingly detailed, a fun story, and a good game. I feel that it is like Arkham Knight meets spiderman, with a much more open world feel.

You really and truly feel as if you were spider man. I think the designers nailed it with this game, and I highly recommend this to any Marvel fan, or any gaming enthusiast.

AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.product_description: Immense fun truly comes in small packages! The HORI Fighting Stick Mini is compact, convenient for storing, and improves your gaming performance. This new HORI stick is smaller than a notebook, but offers the full set of buttons and joystick of a proper arcade controller. The case even provides space for players to rest their wrists for those long gaming sessions. Turbo functions are fully intact, and buttons can be set to 20 times per second turbo or turbo hold for sustained firing. Besides shooting and fighting games, the controller is also compatible with a vast array of game genres.
AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.review_text: A bit too small for people with big hands/long fingers.  Other than that it is a very functional stick.  For people who like to use the stick on their lap this is not stable enough to pull off some moves with.  Placing the stick on a table makes up for the instability.  Or you can glue it to a price of 2x4 to give you stability when playing on you lap.

AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.product_description: Product Description "From George Kamitani and Vanillaware, the mind and design team behind Odin Sphere and Muramasa: The Demon Blade, Dragon's Crown is a multiplayer action RPG with breathtaking visual style, a design built around cooperative play and epic boss fights, and the ability to discover a new adventure in every play session. With Dragon's Crown, developer Vanillaware deftly marries stunning hand-drawn and animated art work with deep, action-packed hardcore gameplay.  Safe on the surface of the earth, humans believe that they dwell alone. Dragons, monsters and magic are simply fantasies to mankind — but what undiscovered secrets may lie right below our feet? Deep underground, a sprawling labyrinth holds treasure — and danger — beyond your wildest belief. Now, the portals to the subterranean world of magic have opened to you, inviting you on a perilous and glorious mission to uncover the dark secrets guarded by a deadly dragon. Descend into the labyrinth and arm yourself for massive-scale battles and magical encounters in the Dragon's dungeons.  The mysterious Dragon's Crown holds infinite power that's coveted by many. As a fierce warrior, you must journey through the winding pathways of the underground world to ensure that this power doesn't fall into the wrong hands. Embark on quests that take you across varying dungeon worlds, where you'll battle tremendous dragons and other powerful bosses in exhilarating combat. Hunt for hidden treasure, items and weapons that will propel you on your quest. Decide to team up with a legion of friends or take the road alone — whatever you choose, prepare for nonstop action and intense, role-playing immersion on your hunt for the Dragon's Crown.  Brandish your blade, dust off your grimoire, and rally your online adventuring party. Dragon's Crown thrusts you into a fantastical medieval world packed with labyrinthine dungeons to explore, vile monstrosities to smite, and nearly endless online adventure. Your mission is to dive into the dank underworld, uncovering treasure and strengthening your mettle as you unlock the secret behind the ancient dragon threatening the world.  • Descend into a labyrinth underground world on a quest to unlock the secrets behind a mighty dragon that threatens the land  • Hunt for hidden treasure, items and weapons that will maximize your power and aid you on your mission  • Embark on a variety of different, daring quests throughout endless dungeon worlds in addicting, long-lasting gameplay  • Battle deadly dragons and other fearsome foes in massive boss battles  • Customize and raise your character to experience the world in exciting new ways  • Join forces with your friends and conquer monsters together  • For 1 to 4 players" Amazon.com Brandish your blade, dust off your grimoire, and rally your online adventuring party. Dragon’s Crown thrusts you into a fantastical medieval world packed with labyrinthine dungeons to explore, vile monstrosities to smite, and nearly endless online adventure. Your mission is to dive into the dank underworld, uncovering treasure and strengthening your mettle as you unlock the secret behind the ancient dragon threatening the world. Embark on quests  Dragons, monsters and magic  Nonstop action Synopsis Safe on the surface of the earth, humans believe that they dwell alone. Dragons, monsters and magic are simply fantasies to mankind — but what undiscovered secrets may lie right below our feet? Deep underground, a sprawling labyrinth holds treasure — and danger — beyond your wildest belief. Now, the portals to the subterranean world of magic have opened to you, inviting you on a perilous and glorious mission to uncover the dark secrets guarded by a deadly dragon. Descend into the labyrinth and arm yourself for massive-scale battles and magical encounters in the Dragon's dungeons. The mysterious Dragon's Crown holds infinite power that's coveted by many. As a fierce warrior, you must journey through the winding pathways of the underground world to ensure that this power doesn't fall into the wrong hands. Embark on quests that take you across varying dungeon worlds, where you'll battle tremendous dragons and other powerful bosses in exhilarating combat. Hunt for hidden treasure, items and weapons that will propel you on your quest. Decide to team up with a legion of friends or take the road alone — whatever you choose, prepare for nonstop action and intense, role-playing immersion on your hunt for the Dragon's Crown. Key Features: Descend into a labyrinth underground world on a quest to unlock the secrets behind a mighty dragon that threatens the land Descend into a labyrinth underground world on a quest to unlock the secrets behind a mighty dragon that threatens the land Hunt for hidden treasure, items and weapons that will maximize your power and aid you on your mission Hunt for hidden treasure, items and weapons that will maximize your power and aid you on your mission Embark on a variety of different, daring quests throughout endless dungeon worlds in addicting, long-lasting gameplay Embark on a variety of different, daring quests throughout endless dungeon worlds in addicting, long-lasting gameplay Battle deadly dragons and other fearsome foes in massive boss battles Battle deadly dragons and other fearsome foes in massive boss battles Customize and raise your character to experience the world in exciting new ways Customize and raise your character to experience the world in exciting new ways Join forces with your friends and conquer monsters together Join forces with your friends and conquer monsters together For 1 to 4 players For 1 to 4 players From the Manufacturer view larger Dragon's Crown In a world under supression by the tyranny of a mysterious dragon, six heroes—each skilled with their own specialized fighting tactics—will risk their lives to return the balance of their world. As a 2-D multiplayer action beat 'em up tale, Dragon's Crown paints the story of a beautiful land under the reign of a mysterious dragon. Under this authoritarian rule, a group of unlikely heroes battle hordes of creatures from mythical lands, and take arms to restore peace to their land. Discover the secret behind the dragon that threatens the world. Where will the quest to finding the Dragon's Crown lead you? With a Breathtaking Visual Style Gather your team and join the adventures in the kind of lavish, hand-painted fantasy world that only developer Vanillaware (makers of Odin Sphere and Muramasa: The Demon Blade ) can create. Inside this fantastical medieval world, you will feel the painstaking efforts that infuse every detail from a blade of grass to the scales on the game's impressive dragons. Throwback Arcade-Style Action Take control of one of 6 playable characters—Amazon, Elf, Dwarf, Sorceress, Wizard, or Knight—each representing a unique gameplay type, and beat on hordes of enemies to clear each exhilarating side-scrolling level of the labyrinth. Along the way, discover precious treasure and destroy awe-inspiring bosses. Safety in Numbers It's not safe in the world of Hydeland, so it's best not to go it alone. Up to four players or AI compatriots can delve into dungeons simultaneously by using either the drop-in multiplayer on PlayStation 3 via adhoc network on PlayStation Vita. Cross-platform play is not supported. If It's Not Nailed Down... Expert thief NPC Ronnie will join players on their adventures to pick locks, open treasure chests, reveal hidden passageways, and collect loot. The Skills to Succeed Massive skill tree options in Dragon's Crown allows for plenty of custom-tailoring, whether it's beefing up health or magic abilities or tweaking abilities of individual characters. Screenshots About the Game Dragon's Crown is a multiplayer hack and slash, beat 'em up action game with breathtaking visual style, a design built around cooperative play and epic boss fights, and the ability to discover a new adventure in every play session. With Dragon's Crown, developer Vanillaware deftly marries stunning hand-drawn and animated art work with deep, action-packed hardcore gameplay. Dragon's Crown allows up to four players to team up online or locally to clear out monster-ridden dungeons, discover precious treasure, and destroy awe-inspiring bosses. Its unique, highly replayable design means that every time players can boot up and log on, they can expect a different experience and hours upon hours of satisfying adventuring. Unparalleled in their unique style, developer Vanillaware painstakingly hand-paints every detail, be it a blade of grass or the scales on the game's impressive dragons. The game becomes a lush, vibrant storybook come to life when everything starts to animate in gorgeous full HD. See more
AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.review_text:
The game itself is full of fun button mashy levels that never get old because as you progress through the game you unlock different paths and ways to fully complete every stage.
The artstyle is gorgeous!! Every level's background looks like a moving mural. The enemies are very distinct and not just reskins which gives the game a nice fresh feeling seeing how you play a lot of each level.
Gameplay is fun. Its a combination of button mashing Square or Circle to attack and to get more detailed you combine the directional pad to each button for different attacks. You can also hotkey 4 abilities, spells, items or potions for added variety.
The online isn't available until you progress somewhat into the game. You can choose to play offline and choose your own characters to play with from resurrecting fallen soldiers you find in each level or go online and play with friends or have someone else drop into your match. Unfortunately I don't think there is any option for voice chat so it makes it hard to tell people what to do but game is fairly straightforward enough that too much strategy isn't really required.

The Artbook is fantastic. Lots of great drawings that show off the colorful characters in the game. Too bad its very highly sexual in manner you might be confused for a perv if the wrong people thumb through it.

The sexploitation aside its a solid RPG lootfest that is pretty good to play offline or online.

AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.product_description: The democratic government of Isla Trueno has been overthrown and a military regime comes into power. The country becomes a theatre of influence war. You are sent as one of the covert commandos to support the rebels fighting their oppressor. This is the most realistic sniping experience in a video game ever! You'll find yourself in wonderfully reproduced jungles of the South American rainforests as you become part of a breathtaking story of the rise and fall of a ruthless dictator.
AFSLRB44YEMHY2UKKUXWCWKQ3EHQ.review_text:
Is it enjoyable yes. Is the game broken unfortunately yes. You think they would fix alot of things that was wrong with it the first time before rereleasing it on the ps3 instead of just adding new features. Far as i know they have since i have not played the xbox or pc versions so for all i know it could be a ton better but still kinda bad.

First of all this game is best suited for people who love sniping. People who hate sniping or aren't very good at it will probably hate this game. Does this game have it's faults yes many, but the sniping makes up for it(atleast for me). If you can over look some of its faults you can really enjoy a game like this. Now for the breakdown...

The good :)

Graphics aren't amazing but pretty good for a modern shooter. Nothing Battlefield or Cod worth but definitely better looking than Medal of Honor.

Sound is great. The music during the missions adds to the tension of being shot at while trying to snipe people and not getting noticed. Also the sound that a silenced sniper rifle makes is just awesome.

Bullet cam. This is the best part of the game IMO. You setup your shot, measure wind, monitor your breathing keeping it steady (shooting during exhales increases accuracy for those long shots), guessing when to aim your shots so it won't get interrupted by the rain/wind, measuring bullet drop (the further your enemy is the more likely gravity will pull the bullet down so you need to aim over your target). For those of you who are lazy Easy and Normal modes of the game come with all that factored in an easy to read red dot. Point, shoot and then watch your shot travel all the way to your enemy. Glorious!!! Another use for the bullet cam would be to scope out the area to see where other enemies would be hiding since your bullet pretty much acts as a really fast disposable camera lol.

The bad :(

The AI is terrible. Laying down in prone and picking off a battalion of enemies is fun but i was hoping for a challenge. Why give us claymores and C4 when the enemy doesn't even come to look for you. When one of their friends gets taken out they run for for 4 feet then just duck. Yes they just duck. For casual sniping fans who are playing on easy, normal this is awesome you just keep getting more crazy headshots and more bullet cams but i was expecting better than that.

Glitches galore. Some are good like being able to exploit the poor level/movement design and climb up rocks very cheaply and have great vantage points to snipe from. Also you can use this same glitch to possibly bypass entire camps by glitching your way up a wall instead of having to carefully snipe/sneak your way through.

Then there is bad glitches, like the trophies glitch. It's not bad if your not a trophy hound but if you are it is very time consuming to have to redo tasks over and over because the game reads things you haven't done yet as already done and therefore it wont unlock. There are a number of trophies in the game that won't pop even if you have done it 5+ times. Example "One shot, Two Kills", the shoot 2 enemies with one bullet trophy i've done atleast 10 times before i seen it pop. Another notorious trophy is the "Fallen Eagle" Trophy where you need to shoot 10 eagles out of the sky. Apparently if you can't unlock this trophy the other trophies in the game won't unlock causing some people to have to delete their saves and play the game over from scratch. So its advised to get that trophy out of the way during the tutorial. If it doesn't pop you don't have to go far when you start over.

The movement and level design mechanics are broken and annoying. If you jump over anything you will end up slipping and getting stuck into crevaces alot! When your crouched you can't climb stairs. It is advised to crouch everywhere to avoid being spotted so being crouched when sneaking through an enemy camp is usually what you will be doing alot unless you need to climb something. So you end up having to stand up and possibly make noise in order to climb stairs and risk being seen.

The rest :/

This is not a COD type game but if you wanted to you can pick up an Assault rifle and go through the game setting off alarms, shooting people and lobbing grenades to your hearts desire like in any COD game. That sounds awesome to some people but for me i thought the whole point of a game like this was stealth seeing how its called Sniper: GHOST warrior. But the game doesn't really punish you for setting off alarms so its possible to go through the game clumsy as hell just shooting people left and right with no regard for stealth whatsoever. Meh...

The main game is pretty easy (even on hard). As long as your used to setting up your shot, know about bullet drop, leading your bullets for moving targets and everything else involved the game isn't that hard. It is extremely rewarding to pull off bullet cams without the red dot telling you where to aim and also very frustrating for some of the longer shots in the game. Thank god a good chunk of the sniper rifles you use are semi-automatic and not single shot or i would have failed some of the time sensitive kill shots. I.e. Sniping a general standing on top of a moving yacht from 350 meters away before he sails off, or trying to hit a sniper in a communications tower from 250 meters away while jets are flying over head masking your shots.

The bonus missions and the challenge mode which is the new features in the game is the hardest part of the game and yet the most glitched. It is very fun but at some point the glitchiness of the game makes getting those trophies a chore. In every new level there is a possible glitch that will make you not get the trophy for that level, so you will end up having to delete your save and try again.

Much like the rest of the game the multiplayer is not great but pretty fun. A big map with a ton of campers usually would suck for people who love action but there is also the choice of running around and gunning people down with your handgun. I found the most fun playing on the tower map where you have to snipe people in other towers while trying not to get sniped yourself.

Far as i can see the game is imperfect that is probably why it was released for $40. But it is definitely fun, if you into a somewhat realistic sniper shooter with long distance cinematic head/body shots. If you like that sort of thing then i say give this game a try.

To sum It all up

Graphics 8+
Sound 9
AI 5
Glitched trophies (unacceptable) 0
The Extras 9
The Sniping 11

AHCJXR7CTE2PZEUDZZTQ6RXX2WHQ.product_description: The DualShock 4 Wireless Controller features familiar controls, and incorporates several innovative features to usher in a new era of interactive experiences. The addition of the Share button makes utilizing the social capabilities of the PlayStation 4 as easy as the push of a button. The DualShock 4 Wireless Controller is more than a controller; it's your physical connection to a new era of gaming.

AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.product_description: Minecraft is a game about placing blocks and going on adventures.Explore randomly generated worlds and build amazing things from the simplest of homes to the grandest of castles. Play in creative mode with unlimited resources or mine deep into the world in survival mode, crafting weapons and armor to fend off the dangerous mobs.
AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.review_text:
I get the sense that Mojang didn't put a whole lot of thought into the game before porting it to the Switch. The game really wasn't designed for the switch. The default controls are no good - because the joystick to adjust view and the button to jump are operated by the same finger, I wouldn't be able to change my view - or thus my jumping direction - while moving without readjusting the entire control layout. Because you have to forward tap the joystick that moves you in order to run, I can't safely make the same far leaps that I would be able to smoothly make on the computer. I'm still struggling to find a control layout that actually works, especially because the game won't let me map controls to the lower left buttons on the Switch.

The controls also really aren't as sensitive as they need to be - it's really hard to nudge the joysticks just so for precise adjustments. They also didn't make use of the Switch's motion controls AT ALL, which is a huge shame because that could've helped offer a different way to make precise adjustments to, say, the camera or something.

I'm also not fond of the way they redesigned the crafting interface - now instead of plugging materials in, you have to search a convoluted menu to click on the item you want, with no way to filter so that it only shows, say, things you can craft from the resources in your inventory.

I loved the idea of having a handheld version of this game, but because of the thoughtless port, it's pretty hard to use.

AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.product_description: Enter the Ultimate Zoo! Make way for over 100 animals from Zoo Tycoon 2 and all the expansion packs - Extinct Animals, Marine Mania, African Adventure, and Endangered Species. Unlock super animals in mini games, create marine shows, capture dinos and much much more! Create wild animal safaris and build awesome attractions for all to enjoy! Create the ultimate zoo, complete with award-winning gameplay and every expansion pack. This is truly the Ultimate Collection! Includes: Zoo Tycoon 2 Featuring an incredible array of detailed animals, dazzling building tools and objects, a new zoom feature, and 3D graphics that allow players to keep a closer eye on the action and craft more creative zoos, Zoo Tycoon 2 is set to crank up the excitement, challenge, and fun of building the ultimate zoo. Easy to start and easy to play, Zoo Tycoon 2 gets you up close and interacting with the animals and zoo, offering intuitive controls and fun tutorials that allow players of all ages to enjoy the game right out of the box. From the start, you'll be immersed in the zoo experience with features including the Zoo Guest mode, in which you can walk around and enjoy the game like visitors on a day at the zoo; Zookeeper mode, which allows you to interact with your animals as never before; and a new Photo mode, which lets you snap pictures of your favorite animals and guests. Zoopedia, detailing all types of entertaining and interesting facts about animals, rounds out the slate of enhanced features. Zoo Tycoon 2 Extinct Animals Shocking News Update! Zoo Tycoon scientists report an unprecedented discovery to worldwide astonishment, amazement, and, frankly, a few raised eyebrows: More than 30 Extinct animals are ready to be brought back to life just for your zoo! From the adorable dodo bird to the massive American mastodon, the ferocious saber-toothed cat, and the terrific T. rex, enchant your guests with animals from the past in Zoo Tycoon 2: Extinct Animals. Head out on a paleontology dig to search for fossils, assemble your finds, and then take them to the Extinct Research Lab to bring your Extinct animals to life! Unveil the drama of Extinct landscapes with misty springs, tar pits, glaciers and maybe even a caveman or two. Once you’ve populated your Extinct zoo, you can research and cure diseases, and even wrangle a pack of rampaging dinosaurs in first-person mode! Zoo Tycoon 2 Marine Mania Take the plunge and experience an ocean of fun as you dive into your Zoo Tycoon 2 dream zoo. Care for marine animals including the fun-loving sea otter the feisty rockhopper penguin and the fearsome white shark! Train the orca and others to perform cool tricks. Then create splashy marine shows that show off your trick-training talents and dazzle your guests. Take a break from showbiz and go for a swim with your animals. Build breathtaking underwater exhibits that delight your animals and discover a treasure trove of marine-themed buildings to deck out your zoo. Dive in and become a zoo tycoon on land and in water! Zoo Tycoon 2 African Adventure Turn your dream zoo into an exotic African adventure. Bring the wilds of Africa to life with the new desert theme pack, and build your exhibits on maps based on legendary African locations. Featuring the African continent's most exciting species -- from the adorable and mischievous meerkat to the elusive white rhinoceros. The Habitat Builder allows players to build moats, waterfalls and more. The Biome Brush provides the final touches on a new exhibit, painting landscapes instantly to create natural deserts, rain forests, and savannah. Zoo Tycoon 2 Endangered Species Bring some of the world's rarest animals home to your zoo with a slew of exotic new content for a zookeeper just like you! Treat yourself and your guests to breathtaking overhead views from the new sky trams. Or drive through your exhibits in the new Jeep vehicle tours. Build bridges and observation decks for a refreshing new view of your animals. And that's not all! There are also erupting volcanoes, new endangered species-themed buildings and scenery, and a whole new set of challenges and campaigns!PC Minimum System Requirements: PC Recommended System Requirements: Processor:   1 GHz or faster Processor:   1 GHz or faster RAM:   1 GB RAM RAM:   1 GB RAM Hard Disk:   3 GB Hard Disk:   3 GB Video Card:   32 MB with Hardware Transform & Lighting / DirectX 9.0 or later Video Card:   32 MB with Hardware Transform & Lighting / DirectX 9.0 or later Supported OS:   Windows 10, Windows 8.1, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP Supported OS:   Windows 10, Windows 8.1, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP Additional Requirements:   DirectX 9.0 or later Additional Requirements:   DirectX 9.0 or later
AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.review_text:
I was honestly just impressed that I could get my computer to run this. I'd been wanting to play this game again for years - it was a staple of my childhood, but free downloads I had tried did not end up working on my machine. Turns out all I needed was the official version lol.

For nostalgia, I rate it 5/5 stars.
For actual playability, I'd give it more like 3/5. The tutorials have an aggressive amount of text without as many intuitive graphics. The interface is definitely dated and, again, not as intuitive as it could be. Glitches where animals and people accidentally clip through fences are not uncommon. You will also be doing a lot of sitting and waiting if you are not playing the freeform version of the game, since money can be slow to accumulate. While you can pass the time cleaning up after the animals and searching for fossils, the meat of the game—building your zoo—is inaccessible while you wait. It's fun, but definitely a timesuck and could have been designed to make the waiting periods more engaging.

AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.product_description: Introducing amiibo: character figures designed to connect and interact with compatible games. By tapping the amiibo over your Wii U GamePad, you'll open up new experiences within each corresponding game.
AHANRC53NQRVQQJJGCF5X5SQ3BXQ.review_text: This is my favorite of all the amiibos. The detailing is really good compared to the others, and I love that the legs are flexible so that you can pose it however you want. The drops from this one aren't super exciting - just some random, non-exclusive guardian items, plus a couple of metal cubes that you can smash to get food. But I bought this for the figurine, so the drops are really just a bonus. :)

AGOKYUNVDXPVGKFK7EISFW6WKZQA.product_description: Daydayup Switch Carrying Case Compatible with Nintendo Switch/Switch OLED, with 20 Games Cartridges Protective Hard Shell Travel Carrying Case Pouch for Console & Accessories, Black
AGOKYUNVDXPVGKFK7EISFW6WKZQA.review_text: Great case, seems supportive enough (not crazy flimsy). The top portion isn't big enough for the charger that came with the NS, but I'm sure it will come in handy. I only have one game, and at $50 each, I'm wondering if I'll buy many more to fill the 16 slot holder. No complaints with the case yet, although I don't think the velcro strap is worthwhile. It doesn't really hold the case in, and it doesn't really hold the game slots down.

AGOKYUNVDXPVGKFK7EISFW6WKZQA.product_description: Arctis Pro Wireless features rock solid dual wireless technology with lag free 2.4G wireless lossless audio and Bluetooth mobile audio, combined with 40,000 Hz capable Hi-Res capable speaker drivers and a Clear Cast mic making it the ultimate gaming audio system. Plus, Arctis Pro Wireless is designed with luxury materials like polished steel and aluminum alloy, and the exclusive Arctis ski goggle headband and Airwave performance fabric ear cushions. The multi input wireless transmitter with an OLED screen and included swappable rechargeable batteries make the gaming audio system as flexible as it is powerful. 2.4g range: 40 ft., 12m 5–40,000 kHzbattery life 20 hours (10 per battery).Bluetooth version 4.1Bluetooth profiles a2dp, hfp, hsp.
AGOKYUNVDXPVGKFK7EISFW6WKZQA.review_text:
I have an issue with the product's firmware (when you power off the headphones, the audio from line-in does not get routed to the line-out). It's a simple firmware fix, but their support consists of the following:
- Email SteelSeries regarding issue
- They tell you to reinstall software, reboot, etc
- Then they tell you to break the headphones into little pieces, and take a picture so they can send you a new one (this is stupid, since the new one would have the same issue)
- Then they forward the request to their software team who has no idea about firmware, and they say there's nothing they can do (there isn't...the software doesn't control this feature, it's the hardware's firmware)
- The ticket gets lost forever

AFIYWCETE5Q6XYM5IC7ACI75SSNA.product_description: Introducing the Xbox Series S, the smallest, sleekest Xbox console ever. Experience the speed and performance of a next-gen all-digital console at an accessible price point. Go all-digital and enjoy disc-free, next-gen gaming with the smallest Xbox console ever made. Bundle includes: Xbox Series S console, one Xbox Wireless Controller, a high-speed HDMI cable, and power cable. Experience next-gen speed and performance with the Xbox Velocity Architecture, powered by a custom SSD and integrated software.
AFIYWCETE5Q6XYM5IC7ACI75SSNA.review_text:
The graphics are a huge improvement over the XBone. If graphics are all you care about, go for it. Everything looks and sounds great. Also, the power packs are the same size and your XBone controllers will work with it. That said, there are three things I'm less than thrilled with.

1. No drive. The S has no disc drive for your old games. If you want to keep playing them, you have to download new copies (i.e., pay for them again).

2. Internet reliant. You HAVE to be connected to the internet. If yours is down, or the Microsoft servers are down, you're screwed. You get to wait until the problem is fixed while reading the increasingly frustrated Twitter comments from users because it's not letting you play ANYTHING that you paid for until the internet or server are back up.

3. Quick Resume SUUUUUUCKS. It's a nice little idea for people who don't share their console with anyone else or tend to stick with a save until they're done with it, but everyone else watch out. Depending on the game, if you want to start a new save with a lot of them, you have to let it load your most recent save first, then jump through hoops before you can start a new game or load the save you want. Worse, YOU CAN'T SHUT IT OFF! It doesn't just default to on; there's no way to turn it off without hacking into your console's operating system. That is inexcusable. XBox is run by smart people; all console and gaming companies are (no matter how much we like to complain they're not, you don't get into the gaming business without being smart). The idea that it never occurred to them that some people might not like (or may even hate) this feature is baffling to me.
predicted_themes: Hardware Build Quality Comfort and Connectivity
